hypothesis: Prompt-only Gan S0 policy patch from the 2026-05-22 Qwen 35B error taxonomy improves pragmatic-category decisions on the dominant over-unknown residual slice without changing scorer semantics, program architecture, candidates, or model track.
metric_caveats: Record_ids are a 25-record validation slice selected from the 63 pragmatic-category mismatches in runs/gan_s0_expanded_builders_prose_full_validation_qwen35b_ollama_20260522T131822Z.
The slice is enriched for the largest observed mode: gold quantified or seizure-free/no-information cases predicted as unknown.
This is a prompt-only policy test against the same g2 candidates-adjudicate architecture, deterministic temporal candidates, Qwen 35B Ollama model track, and deterministic scorer.
Do not compare slice accuracy directly to full-validation metrics; use it as a pre-full-validation regression gate.
Scorer semantics are preserved: Gan seizure_frequency_number[0] remains gold, reference[0] is only a difficulty signal, and evidence support remains diagnostic.
